commands.review_summary:
The PR exports the existing relevant-memory tag stripper and calls it from `sanitizeUserFacingText` before outbound assistant text continues through the delivery sanitizer pipeline.

PR surface: Source +1. Total +1 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: pass text containing `<relevant-memories>...</relevant-memories>` through current-main `sanitizeUserFacingText`; that sanitizer does not call the existing memory stripper, while outbound reply normalization uses this sanitizer. I did not run a live Telegram/channel reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed because contributor real behavior proof is insufficient and maintainers or the author must resolve the unintended SDK-surface expansion before merge.
